name: Richland State Bank
description_short: Richland State Bank is a community bank headquartered in Bruce, South Dakota, offering online and mobile banking services including checking, savings, and loan processing.
description_long:
Richland State Bank is a traditional community bank located in Bruce, South Dakota, serving customers through both in-person and digital channels. The bank has been operating as a full-service financial institution with a physical branch at 602 First Street and a loan processing center.

The bank offers core banking services including online banking, mobile banking with remote deposit capabilities, checking and savings accounts, and loan services. Their digital offerings include a recently updated mobile app (updated October 2025), online banking login portal, remote mobile deposit functionality, and account management features such as balance checking, statement viewing, check image review, and inter-account transfers. The bank also maintains ATM access through the Advantage ATM network.

Richland State Bank distinguishes itself through its commitment to rural community banking and accessibility. The bank provides toll-free support (800-339-1474), maintains personalized customer service channels, and has integrated fraud monitoring with text-based alerts. Their remote deposit and mobile banking capabilities reflect efforts to modernize while maintaining a local presence. The bank also emphasizes customer security education, including warnings about fraud protection and online security resources.

As a small community bank, Richland State Bank is best suited for customers seeking personalized service and local banking relationships rather than extensive product breadth. The institution appears stable and FDIC-backed based on their operating statement availability, though as a small regional bank, it offers fewer specialized products compared to larger national institutions. Customers should note the limited branch presence and geographic focus on the upper Midwest. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking login and account access
Mobile banking app with account management
Remote mobile deposit through smartphone app
Check image viewing and statement access
Fraud monitoring with text message alerts
Customer support via phone, email, and in-person
pros: Recently updated mobile banking app (October 2025) with active development and improvement
Remote mobile deposit feature available through app with clear enrollment process
Toll-free customer support line (800-339-1474) in addition to local phone number
Text-based fraud monitoring system that does not request sensitive information
Extended Friday hours (9am-6pm) providing better accessibility than typical M-Th-only banks
Advantage ATM network access for expanded cash withdrawal locations
Free online security education resources and FDIC fraud protection information provided
cons: Limited branch presence as a small regional bank with single location in Bruce, SD
Restrictive business hours Monday-Thursday (9am-3pm only), limiting accessibility
Remote deposit daily cutoff at 2:30pm CST on business days delays next-day processing for afternoon deposits
No indication of credit card products, investment services, or specialized loan products beyond standard lending
Company advises against sending sensitive information via email, suggesting limited secure digital communication infrastructure
best_for: Rural South Dakota residents seeking local banking relationships and personalized service
Customers who value mobile banking convenience with remote deposit capabilities
Small business owners in the Bruce, SD area needing local loan processing and business accounts
Individuals prioritizing community bank values over extensive product selection
diagnosis: Richland State Bank is best for rural South Dakota residents and small business owners seeking traditional community banking with modern digital conveniences. The primary caveat is limited geographic presence and product breadth—this is a small regional bank without the extensive services or national reach of larger institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
